name: 8ball
description: Ask the magic 8-ball a question

name: afk
description: Set your AFK status with an optional reason

name: ban
description: Ban a user from the server (admin only)

name: botinfo
description: Gets technical information about the bot

name: case
description: Look up a moderation case by ID or case number

name: case-note
description: Append a moderator note to a moderation case

name: clear-warnings
description: Clear warnings of a member

name: command-stats
description: Show command execution metrics (owner only)

name: embed
description: Create a custom embed message

name: help
description: Shows all available commands

name: kick
description: Kick a user from the server (admin only)

name: mod-history
description: View moderation history for a user or recent guild cases

name: mute
description: Timeout (mute) a member for a set duration

name: nowplaying
description: Show currently playing track

name: pause
description: Pause the current song

name: ping
description: Replies with Pong and latency

name: play
description: Play audio from a URL or search query

name: purge
description: Delete a specified number of messages (admin only)

name: restart
description: Restart the bot (owner only)

name: resume
description: Resume the currently paused song

name: search
description: Search YouTube tracks

name: serverinfo
description: Get information about the server

name: skip
description: Skip the current song

name: status
description: Show runtime bot status

name: stop
description: Shut down the bot (owner only)

name: stop-song
description: Stop the current song and clear the queue

name: ticket-add
description: Add a user to the current ticket

name: ticket-close
description: Close the current ticket channel

name: ticket-priority
description: Set priority for the current ticket

name: ticket-remove
description: Remove a user from the current ticket

name: ticket-setup
description: Configure and send the ticket panel

name: ticket-transfer
description: Transfer ticket ownership to another user

name: time
description: Show local time for a location

name: unban
description: Unban a user from the server (admin only)

name: unmute
description: Remove timeout from a member

name: uptime
description: Shows how long the bot has been online

name: userinfo
description: Get information about yourself or another user

name: warn
description: Warn a user and create a moderation case

name: warnings
description: View warnings of a member

name: weather
description: Get current weather for a location
